film.title: Notorious
film.overview: Morteza, who avoids marrying his cousin, falls in love with Badri, who introduces herself as a nurse. This is while Morteza's sister's chastity is pregnant by her cousin and is planning to commit suicide. Uncle considers Morteza's marriage with his daughter to be the only condition for the marriage of Effat and his son. This is while Morteza does not know the truth about Badri.

- yes,I think we can fix that. - Thank you.  Some people get too much sun down here,you must be careful.  I think you can be very proud of yourself.  That sand that Devlin brought in shows uranium ore.  So now we know what we're driving at.
